name: Banana-Blueberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Lightly grease twelve 2-1/2-inch muffin cups.
3. Combine flour, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon on a sheet of waxed paper.
4. Beat bananas in a large bowl with an electric mixer until mashed.
5. Add eggs, brown sugar, butter, and vanilla, beating until blended.
6. Stir in the combined dry ingredients with a wooden spoon until almost blended.
7. Stir in blueberries just until combined.
8. Spoon batter into prepared muffin cups, dividing equally.
9. Prepare Topping: Combine sugar and lemon rind in a small dish.
10. Sprinkle topping evenly over muffins.
11. Bake in the preheated 400°F oven for 20 to 22 minutes or until golden.
12. Remove muffins from pan to wire rack.
13. Serve hot.
Makes 12 muffins.
